_comment: zen theme (Presentation Zen) — fullscreen background images with centered key message. v1.0.0: new paradigm. No thumbnail panel; uses shared TOC drawer from ppt-engine.
name: zen
description: Presentation Zen theme — fullscreen background images with semi-transparent overlay and centered key message. Optimized for visual storytelling with minimal text (max 3 bullets). No side image panel; background image covers the entire slide.

rendering.navigation: TOC drawer + footer bar — prev/next, transition mode selector, script toggle, timer, TTS controls

content_rules.notes: Presentation Zen style. Titles up to 30 chars. Max 3 bullets per slide as subtle secondary text. Background image expected on every slide. Speaker script for narration.

incompatible_styles.name: visual-heavy
incompatible_styles.reason: visual-heavy already applies full-bleed background-image via CSS — would double-apply with zen's built-in background system.

recommended_structure.notes: Optimized for concise visual storytelling. Each chapter = topic + detail + punchline. Background images essential.

author: co-deck
